prompt: Perform a thorough audit of the codebase at ~/Documents/graph-dl. Find bugs, security issues, performance problems, and anything else worth fixing. Rank by severity.

assertions.text: Report contains a Summary section with a brief overview of the codebase and key findings
Report contains a structured Findings section with individual issues
Each finding has a severity level (Critical/High/Medium/Low)
Each finding has a category (Correctness/Security/Error Handling/Performance/Maintainability)
Each finding cites specific file paths with line numbers
Each finding includes evidence such as code snippets or specific patterns
Each finding includes a suggested fix
Each finding includes an effort estimate (Small/Medium/Large/Architectural)
Findings are ordered from highest to lowest severity
Report includes an Issues Not Found section noting categories with no significant findings
No findings are speculative -- every issue is backed by specific code evidence
